# AdminService

AdminService documents infrequent control-plane RPCs.

**RotateKeys** ( [RotateKeysRequest](../messages/RotateKeysRequest.md) ) returns ( [RotateKeysResponse](../messages/RotateKeysResponse.md) )

RotateKeys starts a synthetic long-running operation.

```protobuf
rpc RotateKeys (acme.example.v1.[RotateKeysRequest](../messages/RotateKeysRequest.md)) returns (acme.example.v1.[RotateKeysResponse](../messages/RotateKeysResponse.md));
```
